concerns.text: Missing task for the 'Fixed Topology, Regenerated Trace' loop mechanism. The plan (Phase 2) and spec (FR-006, SC-003) require 10 independent replications where the topology is frozen and traces are regenerated per seed. Tasks T039-T043 describe a single trace generation and single run. There is no task to implement the outer loop that regenerates the full dataset (adapters + topology + trace) for each of the 10 seeds, which is a hard requirement for statistical validity.

Missing task for SC-002 (Eviction Reduction). Task T046 generates a statistical summary for latency (SC-001) and significance, but there is no explicit task to calculate and report the 'percentage reduction in total cache evictions' (SC-002) with a confidence interval. The spec explicitly lists this as a measurable outcome.

Missing task for FR-009 (Cost Model Calibration). Task T004 sets up cost model parameters, but FR-009 requires the system to *calibrate* these parameters against 'standard published CPU I/O bandwidth values' before running experiments. There is no task to perform this calibration step or to record the source of the calibrated values.

Missing task for FR-008 (Sensitivity Analysis Execution). Task T019 implements the *logic* to generate adapters with varying sparsity, but there is no task to actually *execute* the sensitivity analysis (running the simulation for Low, Medium, High sparsity levels) and generate the comparative report required by FR-008 and Plan Phase 3.

Missing task for FR-011 (Trace Generation with Topological Bias). While T039 mentions generating a trace, it does not explicitly cover the implementation of the correlation mechanism P(Request B | Request A) = base_rate + k * Overlap(A,B) required by FR-011. The task description is vague on the specific algorithmic implementation of this bias.

Stale/Incorrect Tag: Task T024 implements 'simulated network contention (latency jitter)'. The spec (FR-003) and plan explicitly define the MinT infrastructure model as CPU-only with I/O bandwidth and memory copy time. 'Network contention' is not a component of the specified model and risks simulating non-existent hardware behavior. This task description contradicts the spec.
